sentences.target: Vom Kuchen ist noch ein Stück übrig.
sentences.reading: /fɔm ˈkuːxən ɪst nɔx aɪ̯n ʃtʏk ˈyːbʁɪç/

translations.de: Vom Kuchen ist noch ein Stück übrig.
translations.ipa: /fɔm ˈkuːxən ɪst nɔx aɪ̯n ʃtʏk ˈyːbʁɪç/
translations.en: There’s still a piece of cake left.
translations.es: Todavía queda un trozo de pastel.
translations.fr: Il reste encore une part de gâteau.
translations.it: C'è ancora una fetta di torta.
translations.ko: 케이크가 아직 한 조각 남아 있어요.
translations.pt: Ainda tem um pedaço de bolo.
translations.ar: لا تزال هناك قطعة من الكعكة.
translations.nl: Er is nog een stuk taart over.
translations.hi: केक का एक टुकड़ा अभी भी बचा है।
translations.el: Έχει μείνει ακόμα ένα κομμάτι κέικ.
translations.nb: Det er fortsatt et stykke kake igjen.
translations.sv: Det finns fortfarande en bit tårta kvar.
translations.ro: Mai e o felie de tort.
translations.da: Der er stadig et stykke kage tilbage.
translations.fi: Kakkua on vielä yksi pala jäljellä.
translations.ja: ケーキがまだ一切れ残っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contracted von + dem) introducing a partitive/source PP.
Noun (dative singular) as the object of the preposition, denoting the whole from which a part remains.
Copula (3rd sg pres) linking the subject ‘ein Stück’ to the predicative adjective ‘übrig’.
Adverb meaning ‘still/yet’, modifying the predicate to indicate continued remainder.
Indefinite article (nominative neuter singular) with ‘Stück’, forming the subject.
Noun (nominative neuter singular) serving as the subject of the copular clause.
Predicative adjective meaning ‘remaining/left over’, complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Ich habe noch zehn Euro übrig.

translations.de: Ich habe noch zehn Euro übrig.
translations.en: I still have ten euros left.
translations.fr: Il me reste encore dix euros.
translations.ru: У меня ещё осталось десять евро.
translations.nl: Ik heb nog tien euro over.
translations.uk: У мене ще залишилося десять євро.
translations.hi: मेरे पास अभी भी दस यूरो बचे हैं।
translations.el: Μου έχουν μείνει ακόμα δέκα ευρώ.
translations.nb: Jeg har fortsatt ti euro igjen.
translations.sv: Jag har fortfarande tio euro kvar.
translations.da: Jeg har stadig ti euro tilbage.
translations.fi: Minulla on vielä kymmenen euroa jäljellä.
translations.ja: まだ10ユーロ残っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular), subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb; with the particle ‘übrig’ it forms the separable verb ‘übrig haben’ (‘to have left’).
Adverb adding the sense ‘still/yet’, reinforcing the remaining-amount reading.
Cardinal numeral modifying the measure noun ‘Euro’ (quantity).
Currency noun (accusative plural) as the direct object of ‘haben’.
Separable verb particle completing ‘übrig haben’ (‘to have left’).

sentences.target: Wir lassen etwas für morgen übrig.

translations.de: Wir lassen etwas für morgen übrig.
translations.es: Vamos a guardar un poco para mañana.
translations.fr: On en garde un peu pour demain.
translations.it: Ne lasciamo un po' per domani.
translations.pt: Vamos deixar um pouco para amanhã.
translations.vi: Bọn mình để lại một ít cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: We laten wat over voor morgen.
translations.hi: हम कल के लिए थोड़ा छोड़ रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi sparer litt til i morgen.
translations.da: Vi gemmer lidt til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日のために少し残しておく。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural), subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; with the particle ‘übrig’ it forms the separable verb ‘übrig lassen’ (‘to leave over’).
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object (what is being left over).
Preposition introducing a temporal PP (‘für morgen’) indicating for when it is being left.
Temporal adverb used as the complement of the preposition in the PP ‘für morgen’.
Separable verb particle completing ‘übrig lassen’.

sentences.target: Im Akku sind nur noch fünf Prozent übrig.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈakuː hat nuːɐ̯ nɔx fʏnf pʁoˈtsɛnt ˈyːbʁɪç/

translations.de: Im Akku sind nur noch fünf Prozent übrig.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈakuː zɪnt nuːɐ̯ nɔx fʏnf pʁoˈtsɛnt ˈyːbʁɪç/
translations.en: The battery only has five percent left.
translations.es: La batería está solo al cinco por ciento.
translations.fr: La batterie n’a plus que cinq pour cent.
translations.it: La batteria è solo al cinque per cento.
translations.ru: В батарее осталось всего пять процентов.
translations.pt: A bateria está só com cinco por cento.
translations.vi: Pin chỉ còn năm phần trăm.
translations.ar: لم يتبق في البطارية سوى خمسة بالمئة.
translations.nl: De batterij staat nog maar op vijf procent.
translations.hu: Az akkumulátor már csak öt százalékon van.
translations.hi: बैटरी में अब केवल पाँच प्रतिशत बचा है।
translations.pl: Bateria ma już tylko pięć procent.
translations.el: Η μπαταρία έχει μείνει μόνο στο πέντε τοις εκατό.
translations.nb: Batteriet har bare fem prosent igjen.
translations.sv: Batteriet har bara fem procent kvar.
translations.ro: Bateria mai are doar cinci la sută.
translations.cs: Baterie má už jen pět procent.
translations.da: Batteriet har kun fem procent tilbage.
translations.fi: Akkua on jäljellä vain viisi prosenttia.
translations.ja: バッテリーは残り5％しかない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contracted in + dem) introducing the locative/existential clause.
Noun (subject) indicating the device whose charge remains.
Copula (3rd pl pres) linking ‘fünf Prozent’ to the adjective ‘übrig’.
Focus particle limiting the quantity (‘only’).
Adverb indicating continued remainder.
Cardinal numeral quantifying ‘Prozent’.
Measure noun forming a quantity phrase as the subject of the clause.
Predicative adjective meaning ‘remaining/left over’, complement of the copula.
